description: The percentage labels on the pie chart are formatted inconsistently: the largest slice (Technology) shows a rounded whole number like "36%", the middle slice (Furniture) shows two decimal places like "32.40%", and the smallest slice (Office Supplies) shows one decimal place like "31.5%". Additionally, the font sizes vary dramatically across the three labels (large, very small, and medium), making the chart look haphazardly assembled and difficult to read at a glance.
